speaker: charlie
text: Well team, as we wrap up today's Bright Side, remember that tonight's your chance to see the Lyrid meteor shower peaking in those beautiful clear skies Sam mentioned.

speaker: alice
text: And on this Earth Day, every small action counts. Whether it's composting at home, supporting local environmental groups, or just spreading the good word about the amazing work happening in our communities.

speaker: charlie
text: From all of us here at ParkSyde Bright Side, keep looking up, keep looking forward, and keep spreading the positivity. We'll be back tomorrow with more good news from around the globe.

speaker: alice
text: Until then, enjoy this gorgeous Queensland autumn day, maybe do something kind for our planet, and remember - there's always something to smile about.
